items.title: UDE Sports
items.description: UDe Sports Management Limited came with a clear mission — connect Nigerian football talent to global opportunities. What they needed was a brand and digital presence serious enough to open the right doors.

items.title: Candoxa
items.description: Digital Identity Onchain Forever. Document your profile once. Prove them forever. Candoxa creates an immutable, professional record of everything you've built.

items.title: SaleTick
items.description: Making a WhatsApp business tool feel like a brand Nigerian entrepreneurs actually want to belong to.
